payload:
Complete the following user request:

<request added="original (start of loop1)" from="user" commit="2d03959" time="2026-05-02 21:52 EDT">

Task: focus on `32×32 -> 128×128` spatial case with CRPS as metric. <2 hr of training allowed. Do the best you can.
test dataset/task: `32×32 -> 128×128` exactly as in "constrained-downscaling"
Use CRPS as eval metric; you may use any loss function for training.

Most iterations should spend ~2hrs to try models, tune parameters, research papers, and then... [truncated, 1777 chars total]

Iter1: GAN baseline trained (200ep L40S). CRPS bug found in baseline code. GAN has zero spread (mode collapse) so CRPS=MAE=0.307. Need proper probabilistic model for CRPS improvement. GAN+softmax not trained (GPU time expired). Next: implement diffusion-based ensemble or fix GAN diversity.

Iter2: Flow matching model trained (100ep L40S, 87min). CRPS=0.252 vs baseline 0.307 (-18%). Key: ensemble spread=0.455 (vs GAN ~0). Mass violation slightly worse (0.058 vs 0.045, no constraints). CRPS formula verified. Next: add SmCL constraints to flow output, try more Euler steps, or train longer.

Iter3: Post-hoc mult constraint on flow model. CRPS=0.246 (-2.2% vs unconstrained, -19.8% vs GAN baseline). Mass violation 0.058->0.0001. SmCL (exp-based) fails post-hoc (CRPS=0.553). Commit 985890b. Next: more Euler steps, train longer, or train with constraint in-loop.

Iter4: Constraint-aware flow matching training. CRPS=0.2424 (-1.5% vs post-hoc mult, -20.9% vs GAN baseline). Mass viol 0.0001. Added checkpoint resumption, Heun solver (bad at 20 steps). Commit 8ba8cb9. Next: more Euler steps, larger model, CRPS-aware loss.

Iter5: LR-anchor flow matching (x0=LR+0.5*noise). CRPS=0.2218 (-8.5% vs prior best 0.2424, -27.7% vs GAN baseline). Val loss 50% lower. Mass viol 0.0001. Commit 43ea047. Next: tune noise_std, more Euler steps, or try CRPS-aware training loss.

Iter6: CRPS-aware loss NEGATIVE result (CRPS=0.253 vs best 0.222). Energy CRPS spread term over-diversifies at weight=0.1. Eval noise_std mismatch catastrophic (0.603). Best remains iter5 LR-anchor+CA+mult. Commit 15e75c7. Next: try weight=0.01, or train 200ep with T_max=200, or noise_std=0.3 retrain from scratch.

Iter7: noise_std=0.3 + 200 epochs achieves CRPS 0.2066 (NEW BEST, -7% vs iter5 0.2218, -33% vs GAN 0.3066). Val loss 0.000600 (42% below iter5). Preempted ep181/200 but best ckpt saved. Commit 6871a08. Next: noise_std sweep (0.2?), larger model, 50 euler steps.

Iter8: noise_std=0.2 confirms CRPS plateau at ~0.206 (0.2065 vs ns03 0.2066). 50 Euler steps marginal (-0.4%). Val loss 33% better (0.000398) but no CRPS gain — accuracy/diversity tradeoff saturated. Corrected DEC-004. Need fundamentally different approaches to break plateau: larger model, attention, different architecture. Commit d4dc199.

Iter9: Self-attention + larger UNet (48,96,192, 5.2M params) breaks CRPS plateau: 0.2047 vs 0.2066 ns03 (-0.9%). MSE -7%, better calibration (spread/MAE=0.91). Trained 120/200 epochs (preemption). Also found/cancelled 3 dangling GPU jobs (flow-v3, eval-v3, eval-v3r). Fixed config-saving bug. Commit 02e323d.

Iter10: Completed attention model training to 200ep (from 120ep). CRPS=0.1991 (new best, -2.7% vs 120ep, -35.1% vs GAN baseline). Broke 0.20 barrier. Mult constraint: 0.1991 vs none: 0.1995. Val loss improved to 0.000540. Cancelled 7 dangling GPU jobs. Commit 8e5acaf.

Iter11: Added EMA (decay=0.999) to attention model training. CRPS=0.2002 — no improvement over non-EMA best (0.1991). EMA smoothing redundant with cosine LR schedule to zero. Also fixed metrics-before-save bug in eval. Trained 188/200ep across 4 preemptions. Best remains iter10 non-EMA attn model (CRPS=0.1991, -35.1% vs GAN). Commit 6e91d7e.

Iter12: Added data augmentation (h/v flips). CRPS=0.2220 at 85ep (inconclusive — undertrained vs 200ep baseline 0.1991). Training reached ep105 but was preempted 7 times. Fixed num_workers=0 for container compatibility. Best CRPS remains 0.1991 (iter10 non-aug attn 200ep + mult). Next iteration should write final report — ~5h remain. Commit ba04688.

Iter13: Wrote comprehensive REPORT.md (260+ lines). Best CRPS=0.1991 (-35.1% vs GAN baseline). Covers all 12 experiment iterations, method details, what worked/didn't, reproduction instructions. Cancelled 2 rogue sweep-gpu jobs. Commit e8b0252. Next iteration should review report for accuracy and declare fixed-point if no changes needed.

Iter14: Reviewed REPORT.md for accuracy. Fixed 3 minor factual errors (prediction file path, code structure listing, param count). All core metrics (CRPS=0.1991, -35.1% vs baseline) verified correct from logs. Report is now accurate and complete. Commit d2689c3.

Summary written to TASK_SUMMARY.md. Best CRPS=0.1991 (-35.1% vs GAN baseline). Key concerns: 2 intermediate results lack eval logs (iters 7,9), persistent dangling GPU jobs never root-caused, baseline comparison only against mode-collapsed GAN, no attention vs model-size ablation.

## Reason
completed

## Status
All tasks completed successfully.

## Summary
- Iterations: 15
- Duration: 42h 1m 2s
- Exit code: 0

Most iterations should spend ~2hrs to try models, tune parameters, research papers, and then... [truncated, 2448 chars total]

Move REPORT.md to notes/ as self-contained note. Clean up files added since 2d03959 per plan in scratchpad. Keep scripts/flow_downscale.py, scripts/eval_crps.py, .ralph. Remove PROMPT.md, TASK_SUMMARY.md, reports/, logs/*.log (tracked), models/flow_ns03/flow_config.pth, ralph/build.yml, auxiliary scripts. Don't delete model weights from disk. Document reproducibility: best result CRPS=0.1991 has weights at models/flow_attn/flow_best.pth. Valid commit for scripts: 0433093. Mark earlier iteration metrics (iter 2-6, 8) as not reproducible from weights.
